Postdoc Position at the Geneva Symmetry Group

The Geneva Symmetry Group at the University of Geneva is looking for a postdoctoral researcher in philosophy of physics, specializing in symmetry and gauge theory.

Area of Specialization: Philosophy of physics, foundations of gauge theories

Location: Geneva, Switzerland

Duration: 2 years, renewable for a third year

Salary: CHF 85,000 per annum

Starting date: October 1, 2026

Application deadline: June 30, 2026

To apply, send a CV, writing sample, and three letters of recommendation to symmetry@unige.ch.

Conference on Quantum Gravity and Spacetime

Save the date! The annual conference on quantum gravity will be held at the Perimeter Institute from July 12-16, 2026. Abstracts are welcome on all topics in quantum gravity, spacetime emergence, and related areas.

Tenure-Track Position in History and Philosophy of Science at Cambridge

The Department of History and Philosophy of Science at the University of Cambridge invites applications for a University Lectureship (equivalent to Assistant Professor).

We welcome applicants working in any area of HPS, including history of physics, philosophy of biology, and philosophy of medicine.

Location: Cambridge, UK

This is a permanent position. Salary: £42,155 - £55,755 per annum.

Deadline: April 30, 2026
